institution.name: Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Ponce

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 50% at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Ponce vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.6k vs 5.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Ponce fell 26% between 2021 and 2024 (11.9% → 8.8%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Ponce rose 13% between 2017 and 2020 ($5.7k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Inter American University of Puerto Rico-Ponce fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8% → 0.0%).
